message:
feat(python): register ego_graph, degree_mixing_dict, and connected_dominating_set bindings

Add the missing PyO3 module registrations for three algorithm bindings
that were implemented in the previous commit but not yet wired into the
Python module's register() function:

- ego_graph_rust: BFS-based ego subgraph extraction
- degree_mixing_dict_rust: edge counts by (source_degree, target_degree)
- connected_dominating_set_rust: greedy connected dominating set

Without these registrations the functions existed in Rust but were not
callable from Python.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
